title: Obligations and permissions on selfextensional logics
targets: Consequence relations and selfextensionality

title: Connecting Actions and States in Deontic Logic
targets: Separate action and state languages

title: Importing Logics: Soundness and Completeness Preservation
targets: Deductive systems and imported signatures
Rules lifting derivations from imported logics

title: Generalizing Deontic Action Logic
targets: ADeL0 syntax and semantics
Axioms O1-O5, D1-D4, and bridge axioms

targets: Definition 1.1 and the counterexample in Theorem 1.2

Regression test preventing obligation collapse

title: Understanding Hohfeld and Formalizing Legal Rights
targets: Definitions 1-3 for the modal language and models
Relational rights and duties
Hohfeldian correlatives, opposites, and legal power

targets: Register the upstream Rocq proof environment and artifact hashes
